---
title: "00 Course Setup"
format: html
execute:
  eval: false
---

## Scenario

A research prototype is becoming a shared course project. The first engineering task is to make the workflow installable, runnable, testable, and easy to inspect.

## Commands

```bash
uv sync --dev
uv run pytest
uv run python localize.py --config configs/localization.yaml --no-mlflow
```

## Engineering Focus

- source code lives in `ipcv/`
- configuration lives in `configs/`
- runtime artifacts go to `outputs/`
- generated artifacts are ignored by Git
- CI verifies imports, nbdev export, and fast tests

## Exercise

Run the baseline replay, inspect `outputs/localization/baseline/report.md`, then delete the generated output and rerun it.
